info.name: KAMI Web3 Service - Transfer API
info.description: Gasless payment token transfer from a platform user to another wallet. Set `baseUrl` (e.g. `http://localhost:3000`) in collection or environment variables. Requires sender to be a platform user with wallet key; recipient may be any address (charge applied if not a platform user when configured).

request.description:
Gasless transfer of payment tokens from a platform user wallet to another address.

**Body:**
- `chainId` (string) – Chain ID (hex e.g. 0x14a34 or decimal)
- `fromWalletAddress` (string) – Sender wallet (must be a platform user with key)
- `toWalletAddress` (string) – Recipient wallet (must differ from from)
- `tokenSymbol` (string) – Payment token symbol (e.g. USDC)
- `amount` (number) – Amount in token units (human-readable, e.g. 10)

**Responses:**
- 200: `{ success: true, transactionHash, chargeApplied? }`
- 400: Same from/to, invalid body, or invalid amount
- 402: Insufficient payment token balance
- 403: Sender not platform user or not authorized for gasless
- 404: Payment token not found for chainId + tokenSymbol
- 500: Transfer or server error
